girl.name: Sanduni
girl.headline: Sanduni, your smile deserves a beautiful date.
girl.intro: I made this little page just for you, because asking you normally felt too small for someone this lovely.
girl.question: Will you go on a date with me?
girl.questionSub: One evening. Good food. A little walk. A lot of smiles. And me trying my best to make you feel special.
girl.finaleTitle: I will make it sweet, simple, and unforgettable.
girl.finaleMessage: If you say yes, I will bring the smile, the care, and a little surprise just for you.

reason.title: Your laugh
reason.text: It feels like the whole day becomes softer when you smile.

reason.title: Your eyes
reason.text: They make even a small moment feel like a scene from a love story.

reason.title: Your presence
reason.text: I want one evening where the only plan is making you happy.
